overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a rural dirt path through sunlit grasslands. The character passes a stone wall, wooden fences, and a seated NPC while approaching a distant ruined tower in a bright summer setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path alongside field stone wall

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path with swords on his back, approaching a distant figure

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the stone wall in the distance

entered.detail: rough field stone wall running alongside the path
tall stone tower ruins visible on the horizon
large willow tree with hanging branches

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a sunlit dirt path bordered by a stone wall on the right and scattered trees. A ruined tower stands visible in the far distance, and a figure can be seen sitting on the wall ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: path transitioning from stone wall to wooden fence line

events.description: stone wall ends and rustic wooden fence begins on the right side
passing a wooden scarecrow structure with a bird perched on top

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking, approaching a seated NPC near a wooden fence

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the ground near the fence, remaining stationary

entered.detail: rustic wooden posts and rails replacing the stone wall
wooden frame structure with a bird perched on top

segments.scene_description: The stone wall gives way to a wooden fence line as Geralt approaches a seated NPC. He passes a rustic scarecrow structure with a bird perched on it, while the ruined tower grows larger in the center view.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland path with scattered stone ruins

events.description: wooden fence ends, path opens into wide grassland with stone ruins

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks past the seated NPC and continues along the curving path through open fields

entered.detail: scattered stone ruins and rubble beside the path

segments.scene_description: Past the fence line, the landscape opens into wide grassland with scattered stone ruins. The path curves gently as Geralt moves forward, with the ruined tower now positioned to the left as he progresses toward it.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural path that transitions from a confined roadside walk into an expansive grassland landscape. It begins with Geralt walking beside a stone wall under bright sunlight, with a distant ruined tower anchoring the horizon and a figure seated ahead. As the camera advances, the stone wall gives way to a wooden fence line, passing a rustic scarecrow with a perched bird while the tower grows larger in the center of the frame. The scene then opens into wide grasslands dotted with scattered stone ruins as the path curves gently. Finally, the camera tracks forward as the ruined tower shifts to the left, marking the character's steady progress toward the structure.
